overview: EXAMY 4 EXAMINATION COUCH, HEIGHT ADJUSTABLE EXAMY 4 is designed for use in physical examination clinics, private clinics, ultrasound rooms, physiotherapy centers, and hospitals. With smooth electric movement, comfortable upholstery, and excellent stability, each element of the EXAMY 4 couch is crafted to enhance convenience for doctors. This versatile auscultation couch can adapt to various types of examinations, with multiple options and accessories available. Three sectional ergonomic design Easy to operate Backrest adjustment with gas spring Legrest adjustment by gas spring Electrical height adjustment Hydraulic height adjustment two sided foot pedals (optional) Hand remote control Foot control switch (optional) Retractable rolling system fixing floor on 4 rubber caps Epoxy painted steel frame High quality foam with synthetic leather coated 220 kg safe working load Foldable, chrome plated side rails (optional) Breathing space with plug (optional) Paper roll holder (optional) Battery Back-up (optional)
